task.role: You are a Senior Go Engineer with expertise in concurrent systems and microservices. Implement Task 26 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Implement AnalyticsService for notification metrics and delivery statistics
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 24 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Create AnalyticsService with metrics aggregation
2. Implement time-series data collection
3. Add delivery success/failure rate calculations
4. Create channel breakdown reports
5. Set up data retention policies

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-26): Analytics and Reporting Service (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Analytics queries return accurate metrics, time-series aggregation works, performance acceptable for dashboard queries

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
